source_pr.title: test: port lock table ut from mysql
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
port some unit test from mysql for lock table (https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/10343)

### What is changed and how it works?
add some unit test

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: test: port lock table ut from mysql.
fix_pattern: test: port lock table ut from mysql
analysis:
